arguments.query: Slate Ridge Trail official parks department

stages.purpose: Resolve the authoritative organization while rejecting the secondary distractor.

arguments.query: site:dunmere-parks.fixture Slate Ridge Trail bridge closure reopening

stages.purpose: Search within the resolved organization's corpus for a primary source.
Fetch the primary document instead of treating its snippet as evidence.

arguments.query: site:dunmere-parks.fixture Slate Ridge reopening official bulletin copy

stages.purpose: Recover from the injected fetch failure by locating another official copy.
Fetch the alternate official document and use its contents as evidence.

response_constraints: Cite the fetched primary-source URL rather than a search-results page.
Treat search snippets as navigation aids, not final evidence.
Separate sourced facts from any inference.
Include no explanation of the failed URL or bridge work outside the required line.

prompt: Identify the official parks department for Slate Ridge Trail, then verify from a primary closure notice when the trail reopens after bridge work. If the first notice cannot be fetched, find another official copy. Respond exactly `Trail=Slate Ridge Trail; Reopens=YYYY-MM-DD; Source=<URL>`.

search_1.query: Slate Ridge Trail official parks department

results.title: Summary of Slate Ridge Bridge Work Notice
